_comment: FieldAnalysis Test Configuration Template - Copy and adapt for your project

_docs.name: Unique test identifier
_docs.source_dir: Relative path from this config file to the source directory
_docs.output_dir: Relative path from this config file to the output directory
_docs.default_variant: Default variant name to use when --variant is not specified
_docs.lto: Set true to use LTO multi-file workflow (llvm-link + opt)
_docs.multithread: Default multithread setting; variants can override
_docs.simple_access: Use simple access record mode (field_id only, no address). Set true to pass --simple-access-record to opt
_docs.pre_compile: Shell command to run before compilation; {source_dir} and {test_dir} are replaced
_docs.input_files: Named input files; referenced as {name} in run_args
_docs.output_files: Named output files; referenced as {name} in run_args
_docs.trace: Default trace settings; can be overridden by CLI flags

variants._comment: Each variant defines a different build configuration
variants.opt_level: Optimization level (O0/O1/O2/O3); controlled by runner, do NOT put -O* in compile_flags
variants.sources: List of source files relative to source_dir
variants.compile_flags: Flags passed to clang during compilation (exclude -O*)
variants.run_args: Arguments passed to the executable; placeholders: {nthreads}, {input_file_name}, {output_file_name}
variants.multithread: If true, runtime is built with -DFIELDANALYSIS_MULTITHREAD
variants._lto: If true, this variant forces LTO workflow regardless of top-level lto setting

name: my_test
